## Contributor checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when applicable.
- [ ] macOS, Linux, Windows, and Windows Git Bash compatibility was considered.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, paths, and examples are sanitized and public-safe.
- [ ] No secrets, private project data, generated reports, or test artifacts are included.
